## Entity boundaries

| Entity | Role | Where to build |
|--------|------|----------------|
| **TrustField Technologies** | Partnerships, corporate GTM, compliance program | TrustField repo/chat (not Noetfield) |

## Canada market thesis (TrustField lens)

| When | Force | TrustField implication |
|------|--------|----------------------|
| 2026 | CDB Phase 1 (read) | Partner-led corporate narrative |
| 2026 | RPAA + MSB | Dual evidence tracks if execution activities |
| 2026 H2 | RTR | Defer write-access GTM if delayed |
| Mid-2027 | CDB Phase 2 (write) | Accredited partners only |
| May 1, 2027 | OSFI E-23 | Ship [e23-vendor-pack-outline.md](./e23-vendor-pack-outline.md) |
